condition: target in title or Registered Replication Report title/metadata
abstract says direct replication, failed replication, independent validation, or named confirmatory/follow-up trial
methods map original study/result/materials/protocol/endpoint
decision_use: pair candidate if original target resolves

condition: table, supplement, repository, preregistration, or source object maps original and replication sides
decision_use: manual screen; candidate when source identity resolves

condition: repository README/package evidence only
decision_use: manual screen or coverage_only until article/source identity resolves

condition: ordinary citation, review statement, or broad literature context only
same-data reanalysis or computational-only reproduction
review/commentary only or no original mapping
affirmative relation evidence
decision_use: eligible for pair candidate and value extraction

condition: moderate relation evidence but missing identity/source-object confirmation
weak or no relation evidence
original effect, original N, replication effect, and replication N directly reported
decision_use: extract values from source_result rows and route by metric

condition: all values reconstructable from means/SDs, t/F/r, event counts, OR/logOR, RR/RD with baseline risk, or registry result tables
effects available but split N or aggregation grain unclear
decision_use: hold with blocker or route coverage/native after review

condition: N available but one side effect missing
decision_use: coverage_only unless source object can be acquired

condition: relation exists but values are inaccessible/paywalled/missing
one-arm overall response rate or no comparator for binary endpoint
D/SMD-compatible inputs and independent larger replication sample
comparative binary inputs with defensible logOR/OR/RR/RD-to-D route
native effects/N available but no defensible D route
real pair exists but public values/source objects are missing or inaccessible
